name: WorkOS
description: WorkOS provides enterprise-ready authentication and identity infrastructure. It handles Single Sign-On (SSO), Directory Sync, Audit Logs, user management, and organization management so you can sell to enterprise customers.

capabilities.name: list_organizations
capabilities.description: List all organizations in your WorkOS environment. Supports pagination and filtering by name or domain.

capabilities.name: create_organization
capabilities.description: Create a new organization representing a customer company. Organizations group users and SSO connections together.

capabilities.name: get_sso_authorization_url
capabilities.description: Generate an SSO authorization URL to redirect a user to their identity provider for login.

capabilities.name: list_connections
capabilities.description: List all SSO connections in your environment. Filter by organization or connection type.

capabilities.name: list_directory_users
capabilities.description: List users from a directory sync connection. Returns provisioned user profiles from the identity provider.

capabilities.name: list_directory_groups
capabilities.description: List groups from a directory sync connection. Returns group names and membership information.

capabilities.name: create_audit_log_event
capabilities.description: Create an audit log event to track user activity for compliance and security. Events are immutable once created.

capabilities.name: authenticate_user
capabilities.description: Authenticate a user via AuthKit with email/password, magic auth, or social login. Returns a user object and session token.
